title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2026
summary:
Main
On May 26, 2026, the iron ore futures market showed a weak trend today, with the main contract I2609 closing at 781 yuan/ton,down 1.95% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices fell by 5-10 yuan/ton compared to the previous day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting prices; steel mills mainly purchased for immediate needs; overall spot market transactions remained low so far.
